name: Crafter
shortDescription: Create SPL fungible tokens on Solana. Discord access passes, tournament tickets, or any on-chain asset.
longDescription: Crafter lets you forge simple SPL tokens on-chain. Pay once per token, then mint, burn, edit metadata, and close when supply is zero. Tokens use legacy SPL so they work with the marketplace escrow.
detailedDescription: Admin creates tokens via a simple form: name, symbol, decimals, description, image. Storage: DecentraGuild API or self-hosted URI (e.g. Arweave). One-time 5 USDC per token. Mint, burn, and edit (name, symbol, image) are free. Close mint reclaims rent when supply is zero. dGuild metadata enables indexer tracking.

activationInstructions.intro: Forge your tokens. Create SPL fungibles for access passes, tickets, or any on-chain asset.
steps: Mint, burn, or edit as needed
Close mint when supply is zero to reclaim rent
activationInstructions.note: Module is active immediately; billing is per token when you create one.
